title: Advanced CI/CD Concepts Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on advanced DevOps patterns.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'Advanced CI/CD Concepts'?
options: To provide more powerful and efficient automation capabilities—such as with GitOps or Infrastructure as Code (IaC)

questions.question: Which of these is a DevOps methodology that uses the Git repositories as the 'Single Source of Truth' for your infrastructure and application's desired state?
